ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species characteristics */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_data" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sepal_length" REAL /* Length of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "sepal_width" REAL /* Width of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "petal_length" REAL /* Length of the petal in centimeters */,
  "petal_width" REAL /* Width of the petal in centimeters */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher associated with the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who uploaded the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the uploaded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES sample_data ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being observed */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes made by the researcher */,
  "observer" TEXT /* Name of the person making the observation */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES sample_data ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES sample_data ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the collaborator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
